description: Brand identity brief generated after direction selection
voice: Professional but approachable. Data-informed without being dry. Confident without being salesy. Uses concrete examples over abstract claims.
audience: B2B SaaS founders and marketing managers who know they need content but don't have time to produce it consistently. They value measurable outcomes over word counts.
positioning: The content partner that treats your brand voice as seriously as you do — augmented by AI for speed, guided by humans for substance.

visualIdentity.typography: Clean sans-serif (Inter or similar), editorial serif for headlines
